topic: A full glass of water appears on my nightstand every night.
title: The Glass By My Bed | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A full glass of water waited on my nightstand again.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a single full glass of water on a dark wooden nightstand, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone in a quiet ground floor flat.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a small ground floor bedroom with drawn curtains, low evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never keep water by the bed. It spills.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a bare nightstand beside a made bed, soft shadow, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yet there it sat, filled exactly to the brim.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a brimming glass of water catching faint light on a nightstand, deep shadow behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I poured it out and went back to bed.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty glass tipped over a bathroom sink, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it stood full again, faintly warm.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a full glass of water on a nightstand in pale dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked the rim and measured it each night.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a glass with a thin marker line near the rim, dim desk lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Always the same level. Always placed by my left hand.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a glass positioned precisely at the left edge of a nightstand, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a second glass appeared beside the first.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of two full glasses of water side by side on a nightstand, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: As if someone now expected two of us here.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of two glasses on a nightstand beside an empty pillow indentation, moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I removed the nightstand entirely the following day.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty wall where a nightstand once stood, faint dust outline, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the glasses wait on the floor, where I sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of two glasses of water on bare floorboards beside a low mattress, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
